News

MP Newsletter: March 2026

Tuesday, 31 March, 2026
Last week I responded to the Government’s consultation on Local Government Reorganisation (LGR). I am firmly opposed to this approach, and I have said so in my submission. Our current system of local government is not perfect, but its most important feature is right there in the name - it is local. The Sevenoaks District has a population in excess of 120,500, and its focus is on delivering for...
